GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL asks for Immunexis-related (or competitor) abstracts/posters at upcoming conferences.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Return any 3 of the bullets from the library below in rich text with the following header: ### Congress Abstracts – <today’s date>
Preset Bullet Library - **12 Immunexis posters accepted for ESMO 2025** – focus on real-world data (# P-567). - **Competitor Brand X oral late-breaker on OS benefit** – prepare comparison slide. - **Nuovo abstract italiano sugli outcome pazienti anziani** – pianifica incontro con autore. - **Digital poster on biomarker-driven dosing** – bookmark for KOL inquiry. - **Satellite symposium on immune-related AEs** – suggest attendance.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Terms like *abstracts, posters, congress, conference, ESMO, ASCO, comunicati, poster Immunexis*.
🚫 Out of scope • Pure commercial booth logistics or spend limits (Compliance Checklist).
